headline: Managing Partner True Green Capital Management
company_description:
True Green Capital Management LLC ("TGC") is a specialized renewable energy infrastructure fund manager with a focus in distributed power generation in the US and Europe.  The Firm is international with offices in Westport, Connecticut in the US and London in the UK and an investment focus across the United States and Europe.

Founded in July 2011, TGC is led by a team of professionals with a proven track record and a demonstrated capacity to originate, finance, construct, and operate distributed renewable power generation projects.

TGC believes the demand for power, the continued increase of power prices, decreasing entry costs of distributed power generation technology and the efficiency of creating and delivering price-competitive electric power at the source will continue to lead to compelling investment opportunities which provide a stable cash flow stream with low correlation to the broader markets.

TGC is currently focused on the approximately $1.5 trillion distributed power generation market in the US, the UK and the EU* with an emphasis on the sub-utility scale solar power segment.  Thanks to power industry deregulation combined with rapid advancements in technology, the economics of distributed power generation, including solar and batteries, are now competitive with traditional electricity generation sources.  In many U.S. states and key European jurisdictions, it represents one of the few sources of new power generation infrastructure that can be added to the power network quickly, reliably, and cost efficiently.

To date, TGC has invested into a distributed solar power generation portfolio across 17 U.S. states, United Kingdom and France, delivering clean, renewable energy.  U.S. states include Vermont, Massachusetts, Rhode Island, Connecticut, New York, New Jersey, Delaware, South Carolina, Tennessee, Idaho, California, Maryland, Colorado, Illinois, North Carolina, Pennsylvania and Virginia.

headline: COO - Lux Bond & Green
company_description:
For over 125 years, Lux Bond & Green has been dedicated to offering exceptional diamonds, fine jewelry, luxury watches, and distinctive gifts. Our commitment to extraordinary customer service, exceptional values, and a curated collection of renowned brands sets us apart. Whether celebrating life's milestones or simply treating yourself, our team of over 100 seasoned professionals is here to make every selection meaningful and memorable.

Our Story

Founded in 1898 by Morris A. Green, Lux Bond & Green began as a humble venture—selling pocket watches and gold eyeglass frames from a horse-drawn cart in Waterbury, Connecticut. In 1932, the second generation of the Green family acquired Lux Bond & Lux Jewelers in downtown Hartford, renaming it Lux Bond & Green. Now in its fourth and fifth generation of family leadership, our company has grown to encompass six premier locations across New England.

Lux Bond & Green Today

From its modest beginnings, Lux Bond & Green has evolved into a trusted name in luxury, with locations in West Hartford Center, Somerset Square in Glastonbury, Main Street in Westport, The Mohegan Sun Resort & Casino, Central Street in Wellesley, Massachusetts, and a new store opening in Mystic, Connecticut, in 2026.

Our partnerships with globally respected watch, jewelry, and gift brands—combined with our own exclusive designs—have cultivated a loyal clientele worldwide. Each of our elegant locations offers a warm, inviting atmosphere staffed by non-commissioned professionals dedicated to helping you find the perfect piece with unparalleled care and expertise.

As New England's oldest continuously operating family jeweler, Lux Bond & Green proudly blends timeless tradition with modern innovation, delivering a shopping experience that's as exceptional as our products.

company_description:
True Green Capital Management LLC ("TGC") is a specialized renewable energy infrastructure fund manager with a focus in distributed power generation in the US and Europe.  The Firm is international with offices in Westport, Connecticut in the US and London in the UK and an investment focus across the United States and Europe.

Founded in July 2011, TGC is led by a team of professionals with a proven track record and a demonstrated capacity to originate, finance, construct, and operate distributed renewable power generation projects.

TGC believes the demand for power, the continued increase of power prices, decreasing entry costs of distributed power generation technology and the efficiency of creating and delivering price-competitive electric power at the source will continue to lead to compelling investment opportunities which provide a stable cash flow stream with low correlation to the broader markets.

TGC is currently focused on the approximately $1.5 trillion distributed power generation market in the US, the UK and the EU* with an emphasis on the sub-utility scale solar power segment.  Thanks to power industry deregulation combined with rapid advancements in technology, the economics of distributed power generation, including solar and batteries, are now competitive with traditional electricity generation sources.  In many U.S. states and key European jurisdictions, it represents one of the few sources of new power generation infrastructure that can be added to the power network quickly, reliably, and cost efficiently.

To date, TGC has invested into a distributed solar power generation portfolio across 17 U.S. states, United Kingdom and France, delivering clean, renewable energy.  U.S. states include Vermont, Massachusetts, Rhode Island, Connecticut, New York, New Jersey, Delaware, South Carolina, Tennessee, Idaho, California, Maryland, Colorado, Illinois, North Carolina, Pennsylvania and Virginia.
